Zhan Yan Ť©ĻŚģī
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zhan Yan (Ť©ĻŚģī). Officer of Liu Bei, he was defeated by Lu Xun by the Yangzi Gorges. Zhan Yan was affiliated with the Shu Kingdom. Zhan Yan lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.
